name_cn:
White Caviar Embroidery·
Y Large Caviar Cowhide Tote/Shopping Bag
The iconic LOGO becomes a modern code. Continuing the legacy of classics, writing a new chapter of inspiration with bold embossing to embrace diverse postures. Extra-large capacity, fits iPad and laptop, perfect for spring/summer travel. Retro minimalist design, great for styling, stylish and photogenic. A hot pick recommended by Ins bloggers~ Really amazing!
Style No.: 668900
Size: 33×22×15
